profile: Otherworld Assassin (UR); DMG Transfer + Multi Burst built entirely around her [Linked Fates] debuff. Her enhanced multi-hit Normal Attack and Ultimate stamp Linked Fates on enemies; carriers take True DMG scaling off their current HP, take +30% DMG from her, and (via Genesis) feed a permanent damage-transfer engine that re-triggers extra attacks. She wants Final DMG, True DMG, current-HP%/Damage-Transfer synergy, multi-hit and ATK scaling. She is Magical and never crits, never heals allies, never tanks, and applies no bleed/infect/control of her own.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Her signature mirror and a perfect description of her kit: +Final DMG, and a big extra +15-40% Final DMG specifically while attacking enemies in Damage Share / Damage Transfer state - exactly the state her Linked Fates creates. At 3+ stars it also adds current-HP True DMG, doubling down on her current-HP burst. Slot first.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG +12-30% with zero conditions; her whole kit (multi-hit attacks, current-HP True DMG, transferred damage) is multiplied by Final DMG. Anima-tier magnitude, universal uptime.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: All attacks add True DMG equal to %ATK; she is a multi-hit attacker (2-target Normal Attack + Swift Slash re-triggers + AOE Ultimate), so this stacks per hit. Pure unconditional damage that ignores DEF, matching her Magical/True-DMG identity.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: 20-45% Final DMG that resets on kill - she is a Multi Burst hero who clears via Swift Slash chains, so kills refresh it. Huge front-loaded Final DMG with high realistic uptime.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: Her Ultimate is a true AOE; this adds 100-400% ATK True DMG distributed across all targets each turn. Strong on her AOE burst, slightly less on single-target turns. Anima magnitude.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: DMG +up to 60% when repeatedly hitting the same enemy in a turn - she repeatedly hits targets via Normal Attack, transferred-damage re-triggers and Swift Slash, so the stack ramps fast on focused targets.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Passively-triggered AOE attacks deal extra current-HP True DMG. Her Genesis Swift Slash / transferred-damage procs are exactly these passive triggers, and current-HP scaling matches her own True-DMG mechanic.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG per attack/Basic Attack, up to 50%. Her multi-hit and re-trigger profile builds stacks every turn; anima-tier ceiling and broad applicability.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: Extra current-HP True DMG when attacking targets with a DoT-type status; modest at low stars (once/turn), but at 3+ stars it fires up to 4x/turn and adds [Torment]. Her debuff-heavy kit and current-HP synergy make this a strong A once the breakpoint is reached.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: Stacking True DMG that ramps as HP is lost, and at 3+ stars adds a current-HP True-DMG nuke at full stacks. Synergizes with her True-DMG theme but needs her own HP loss to ramp, which a fast burst Assassin avoids - good filler, not core.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Skills add True DMG to [Infect] targets - strong True-DMG payload, but she applies no Infect herself, so it only fires with an Infect-applying teammate. Conditional but high value in the right team.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG scaling per Buff on self (up to 30%). She runs some self-buffs (Lifesteal, Genesis states) but isn't a buff-stacker, so uptime is partial; solid filler Final DMG.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Ramping Final DMG per attack, and post-3-star weights Ultimate/Feat hits higher - relevant since her enhanced Normal Attack is a Feat and her Ultimate is key. Decent stacking Final DMG, just slower to cap than Firmament/Wasteward.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Final DMG +4-10%, plus a big bonus vs [Shield] targets. The base Final DMG always applies; the shield clause is situational, so it's a reliable filler with conditional upside.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG, same useful stat as Firmament but at epic magnitude (only +2-5%). Always-on and on-theme, just small numbers - a budget Final DMG filler.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Final DMG +5-15% plus a chance to apply [Lethal] (blocks enemy resurrection). The Final DMG is the useful part for her; the anti-revive rider is good utility in PvP/bosses.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore +5-15%. Helps the Magical-DMG portion of her Normal Attack/Ultimate land harder; less impactful on her True-DMG payloads, but a clean, always-on offensive stat.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: ATK DMG +up to 20% vs enemies with a Debuff. She reliably stamps Linked Fates, so the condition is usually met - but it boosts ATK DMG only, not her True-DMG transfers. Good filler.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: HP% plus +6-15% DMG while her HP exceeds the enemy's. As a fast burster she's often topped up early, so the DMG clause has decent uptime; the HP is mostly wasted on a squishy Assassin.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: Flat ATK%. Every part of her kit scales off ATK (incl. the True-DMG caps), so it's always useful, just small. Generic stat-stick filler.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: Basic Attack adds True DMG up to 4-6x/turn - the True-DMG theme fits, but the trigger is Basic Attack specifically and the 3-star upgrade keys off Crit, which she never has. Partial value only.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: Flat Ultimate DMG +8-20%. Her Ultimate matters (it's how she mass-applies Linked Fates), but it's a 4-turn cooldown so most of her damage is outside it; narrow window.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: Area-attack DMG +10-25%. Only her Ultimate is a true area attack; her core multi-hit Normal Attack and transfer procs are not, so it boosts a minority of her output.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Single-Skill True DMG per Debuff on target. True-DMG and debuff-counting theme fits, but it's a single-target skill trigger and she leans multi-hit/AOE; off-pattern, mediocre uptime.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Single-target ATK DMG +8-20%. Some of her Multi Burst is single-target, but her Normal Attack hits 2 targets and her Ultimate is AOE, so the single-target tag misfits much of her kit.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single-Attack DMG scaling with the target's lost HP - opposite of her current-HP-burst pattern (she profits more from high-HP targets) and single-target-tagged. Marginal.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: True DMG reflect when attacked, scaling off DEF. The True-DMG keyword is on-theme but the trigger is being hit and the scaling is DEF, which she has almost none of; near-dead offensively.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Adds extra [Bleed] stacks when she applies Bleed - she applies no Bleed, so it never triggers.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Adds extra [Infect] stacks when she applies Infect - she applies no Infect, so it never triggers.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Chance to apply Bleed when attacked - defensive, on-hit, off her damage pattern; she doesn't want to be tanking hits.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: Chance to apply Infect when attacked - defensive on-hit trigger, irrelevant to a burst Assassin's offense.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: ATK DMG +vs enemies with Control - she applies no Control herself, so it relies entirely on a CC teammate; off-kit and ATK-DMG-only.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Effect Hit Rate - she has no debuff hit chance worth boosting (Linked Fates is 100% by her kit); does nothing for her damage.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Effect-Hit / [Fox Fire] control package - a control-applier mirror; she is not a control hero and gains only the small Effect Hit stat.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG bonus only while SHE is in a Damage Share state (a defender's perspective); Ananke creates that state on enemies, she doesn't sit in it, so the conditional half is dead and only the small base Final DMG applies.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Crit Rate - she has no crit in her kit and scales on Magical/True DMG; dead stat.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Crit DMG - useless without crit, which she never has.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Crit Rate/DMG and an on-Crit dispel - her entire benefit is gated behind Crit she never lands; effectively dead.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Small Final DMG but the payload is Crit Rate/DMG [Hunt] stacks - the crit scaling does nothing for a non-crit hero, so it's mostly wasted.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: Triggers on ally death and gives Crit Rate + Final DMG - the Crit half is dead for her and the trigger (allies dying) is unreliable; weak.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: True DMG on Feat-Skill CRIT hits - she never crits, so the core trigger never fires despite the True-DMG flavor matching.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: Healing-reduction debuff applied on Crit - double-dead: needs crit she lacks and is a support-utility effect, not damage.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG taken reduction - a defensive anti-crit stat; nothing offensive and she takes no benefit.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED - pure damage reduction for a tank; gives a glass-cannon Assassin no offense.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED (small) - defensive, off-role for a burst DPS.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED - tank mitigation stat, no offensive value for her.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG RED on being attacked - defensive, requires tanking hits; off-role.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Caps incoming big hits - pure tank survivability with no offense; wasted on her.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: DMG-reduction support mirror with no offensive clause; nothing for a DPS Assassin.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Final DMG RED that ramps as SHE loses HP - a brawler/tank pattern; the DR half is wasted and the DMG half needs her near death, which she avoids.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: Flat DEF% - she is a low-DEF Assassin and DEF does nothing for her output; dead stat.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: Flat HP% - pure bulk with no offensive synergy for a burst DPS.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: Flat HP% (legendary) - still just survivability; no damage contribution.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: HP% + self Healing-Received - tank sustain package, off-role and no offense.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: HP% and an AOE True-DMG nova on taking a lethal hit - a tank/last-stand effect; she neither wants HP nor to be hit to lethal, so the True-DMG flavor never pays off for her playstyle.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: ATK/DEF only while she holds a [Shield] - she has no shield in her kit, so the buff almost never activates.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Grants allies shields at battle start - a pure team-support effect that gives her zero personal damage.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: Grants allies Spirit Shield on her death - support utility, no offensive value and conditioned on her dying.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Self-revive on first death - a survivability insurance effect, not damage; low priority for a burst carry.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Recovers lost HP each turn - personal sustain only; no offensive synergy.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: Increases Heal output - she has no allied healing in her kit; effect is dead.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Boosts single-target Heal skills - she has none, so it does nothing.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate - a defensive/anti-CC stat with no offensive value for her.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate buff - purely defensive anti-control; contributes nothing to her damage.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Effect Resist + self-heal on buff expiry - defensive/sustain package, off-role for a burst DPS.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Stacking Basic Attack DMG, and at 3+ stars a chance to launch an extra Basic Attack on kill. Her enhanced multi-target Normal Attack and rapid Multi Burst clears can trigger the on-kill re-attack, but her primary damage is True-DMG transfers (not Basic Attack DMG), so it is solid filler rather than core.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Basic Attack DMG +10-30% helps her enhanced Normal Attack, but the 3+ star upgrade is bonus Crit Rate which is dead on a non-crit hero, and her main payload is True DMG not Basic Attack DMG. Partial value.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Start-of-battle Ultimate DMG boost (and +per Basic Attack at 3+). Her Ultimate is important for spreading Linked Fates, but it is one-and-done per boost window and on a 4-turn cooldown, so most of her damage falls outside it.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED plus bonuses while SHE is in a Damage Share state - a tank/damage-sink mirror. Ananke inflicts Damage Transfer on enemies, she does not sit in it, so this is purely defensive and off-role for her.
